Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs / chore
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for all changed logic
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] Self-reviewed — no debug code, no `console.log`, no commented-out code
- [ ] No secrets or API keys committed
- [ ] Branch follows gitflow naming (`feature/`, `hotfix/`, `release/`)
